title: Best of the Pod: Would You Shut Down Your Most Successful Product? The Arc to Dia Story
full_text: If you had millions of people using a product you spent years building, would you kill it?That’s exactly what The Browser Company did with Arc.Originally recorded in July before The Browser Company’s acquisition by software giant Atlassian earlier this year, we’re republishing this episode because its lessons are truly timeless. Today, the team continues to operate independently under Atlassian’s umbrella.The internet backlash when the company killed Arc in May 2025 was intense, but cofounders J
